nodes.name: Fetch Influencer List
nodes.notes: Create a Google Sheet with a tab called 'Influencers' with columns: Name, Email, Platform, Niche, Followers, Profile URL, Status. Manually add influencer contacts you find on TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, or X.

values.content:
You are a partnership outreach specialist for RinglyAI, an AI receptionist SaaS for small businesses. Write a warm, professional partnership proposal email.

Key details to include:
- RinglyAI is an AI phone receptionist that answers calls 24/7 for small businesses
- We offer a 30% RECURRING monthly commission for every customer they refer
- Average customer pays $99/mo, so that's ~$30/mo per referral, forever
- We provide a custom referral link, promo codes, and marketing assets
- Their audience of small business owners is the perfect fit
- We handle all customer support, billing, and onboarding

Keep the email under 150 words. Be genuine and enthusiastic. End with a CTA to book a 15-min alignment call.

Return ONLY valid JSON with keys: "subject" and "body".

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.email_subject }}
parameters.message:
={{ $json.email_body }}

📅 Book a 15-min call: https://calendly.com/YOUR_CALENDLY_LINK

---
Best,
Ron
Founder, RinglyAI
https://ringly.ai

P.S. Reply STOP to opt out.

nodes.name: Send via Gmail
nodes.notes: Replace YOUR_CALENDLY_LINK with your actual Calendly scheduling URL.
